title: Straame 4-Tier Winged Clothes Airer – Foldable Clothes Drying Rack with Wheels for Indoor/Outdoor Use, Heavy-Duty Laundry Airer, Dryer rack, 76×50×178 cm (Grey)
features: Large capacity, energy-saving drying – Four tiers plus winged sides create ample space for shirts, towels and bedding. Use this clothes airer as your everyday indoor drying rack / clothes horse to dry full loads without heat, cutting bills and protecting fabrics from tumble wear.

Winged layout & lockable wheels – Extended wings hold dresses, shirts and towels at full length. The foldable design opens fast, rolls smoothly and locks in place. Finished for a clean, modern look that suits contemporary homes and utility rooms.

Stable double-column frame – Reinforced stainless-steel tubes and tough joints resist wobble when fully loaded. A space-saving, winged clothes airer that improves airflow so garments dry quickly and evenly, serving as a versatile indoor drying rack/ laundry rack for busy households—no tumble dryer required.

Flexible rails, hooks and tiers – Configure space for delicates, knits and bedding. Works as a winged clothes airer, indoor clothes drying rack, dryer rack and large clothes airer for weekly washes, sports kits and family laundry across all seasons.

Slim fold, easy storage – Tiers lift and fold to a slim profile for behind-door or cupboard storage. Size 76×50×178 cm; folded depth ~21 cm. Durable build quality makes this foldable clothes drying rack / washing airer a long-term home essential.
description: Meet the Straame 4-Tier Winged Clothes Airer, a family-size clothes drying rack built for fast, natural drying indoors. The stable double-column stainless-steel frame supports four wide tiers plus two folding wings, giving generous space for shirts, knitwear, towels and bedding. Roll this indoor clothes airer to a warm spot on lockable wheels, then park it securely while your drying rack laundry breathes. Use it daily as a clothes airer, drying rack or clothes horse—a durable airer and laundry rack that protects fibres and colours from heat. Dimensions 76×50×178 cm; folds to a slim ~21 cm for behind-door storage. The smart winged layout delivers hanging length for dresses and towels, while rails and hooks handle socks and delicates—ideal as a winged clothes airer, indoor clothes drying rack, dryer rack and laundry drying rack in one. This airers clothes indoor foldable design opens and folds in seconds, with reinforced joints for a heavy duty clothes airer feel. Choose Black or Grey to suit modern homes and utility rooms. Save energy by choosing airflow over heat: an efficient alternative to a clothes dryer indoor/clothes dryer rack, this foldable clothes airer/foldable clothes drying rack works year-round. Whether you call it a clothing drying rack, washing airer, laundry airer or traditional maiden clothes dryer, Straame’s 4-tier format gives the capacity of a large clothes airer in a compact footprint—perfect clothes airer indoor folding for busy households.
